articles.title: 대성당, 바자르, 그리고 윈체스터 미스터리 하우스 — AI 시대, 소프트웨어 개발의 세 번째 모델

articles.title: OAuth 2.0 Token Exchange의 다양한 얼굴
articles.summary:
• 하나의 보안 토큰을 다른 토큰으로 변환하는 표준 기반 메커니즘으로, RFC 8693에 정의된 OAuth 2.0 확장 사양

articles.title: Benchmark raises its first-ever growth fund as part of $2B capital raise
articles.summary: The legendary abandons its more than 20 year tradition of keeping its funds to about $425 million.

articles.title: Quick commerce FirstClub doubles valuation to $255M in nine months
articles.summary: The Bengaluru startup has crossed 1 million orders and reached a $50 million annualized GMV run rate within a year of launch.

articles.title: Lovable signs multiyear deal with Google Cloud to up usage 5x, source says
articles.summary: Lovable and Google signed an expanded multiyear deal that involves a 5x expansion of Lovable's footprint on Google Cloud, and expanded access to Anthropic Claude.
